settlements.title: Inova Health Privacy (Pixel Tracking) Settlement
settlements.eligibility_summary: US person who visited Inova public website Apr 29 2022–Apr 29 2024 AND had MyChart account. NO PROOF required.
settlements.rag_context: Pixel tracking on Inova site shared data with FB/Google without consent. Valid only for exact class period. Submit claim form = approved equal-share cash.

settlements.title: Panda Express / PRG Data Breach Settlement
settlements.eligibility_summary: Affected by March 2023 data breach (received notice or had account). NO PROOF for base ~$100 pro-rata; up to $5k with docs.
settlements.rag_context: March 2023 breach exposed names, DOB, SSNs. Base pro-rata cash + optional credit monitoring. California residents get extra.

settlements.title: Amazon Unpaid Wages Settlement
settlements.eligibility_summary: Worked for Amazon Retail LLC in relevant period. NO PROOF required for at least $50.
settlements.rag_context: Unpaid wages class action. No proof needed for base payment.
